events.summary: Latent Space published LoopCraft: The Art of Stacking Loops, framing agent work as a shift from one-off prompting to designing loops that prompt agents. The core idea is to go down a loop for reliability and up a loop for leverage.
@swyx: On LoopCraft, the long-term agent skill is stacking loops effectively: go down a loop when things break, and go up a loop as models improve.
